name: set_zone_overlay
description: Applies a temporary heating override to a specific zone, allowing users to manually set the target temperature and heating power status. The override can be configured to terminate automatically at the next scheduled time block or after a specified duration. Used to temporarily adjust comfort settings without disrupting the schedule.

duration_seconds.description: Duration in seconds for the override when termination_type is TIMER. Required if termination_type is TIMER.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home installation

is_boost.description: Whether this is a boost override (optional, defaults to false)

power.description: Set heating power to ON or OFF

temperature_celsius.description: Target temperature in Celsius. Required when power is ON.

termination_type.description: How the override should terminate: NEXT_TIME_BLOCK (end at next scheduled time), or TIMER (end after specified duration in seconds)

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone to apply the override to
